tools.name: OCR
tools.description: This tool can recognize all text on the input image.

outputs.description: OCR results, include bbox in x1, y1, x2, y2 format and the recognized text.

tools.name: ImageDescription
tools.description: A useful tool that returns a brief description of the input image.

tools.name: RegionAttributeDescription
tools.description: Describe the attribute of a region of the input image.

inputs.name: bbox
inputs.description: The bbox coordinate in the format of `(x1, y1, x2, y2)`

dialogs.content: Using the provided CT image, determine the anatomic location of the depicted mediastinal mass.

dialogs.thought: Check for any embedded labels/annotations that might indicate level or location.
Orient to modality and mediastinal compartment; identify where the mass sits relative to heart/great vessels.

content.content: Axial contrast-enhanced CT image of the chest showing a large soft-tissue density mass in the mediastinum, with arrows pointing to its lateral margins. The mass is positioned anterior to the great vessels/heart, occupying the front mediastinal space.

arguments.attribute: relationship of the mass to mediastinal structures (anterior vs posterior; adjacent vessels/heart)

dialogs.thought: Verify the mass is in the anterior mediastinum by assessing its position relative to the heart/great vessels and posterior elements.

content.content: Within this region there is a large homogeneous soft-tissue mass occupying the anterior mediastinal compartment, lying in front of the heart/great vessels and well anterior to the vertebral body/posterior mediastinum.

dialogs.content: The mass is located in the anterior mediastinum, which is the front part of the mediastinum, an area in the chest cavity between the lungs.
